summary: Notifications System Overhaul - All tests pass. Backend (13/13 passed): templates API, image upload, merchant/send with CTA, click tracking, read marking, unread count. Frontend verified: NotificationsPage with expandable cards, MYU presence/bubbles, SendNotificationPage with template selector/image upload/CTA fields. MYU chat still works. Login works (no up_points float issue). Public menu works.
critical_code_review_comments: Notification templates system well-implemented with 5 types: promo_offer, new_menu, event, welcome, generic
Image upload endpoint properly validates file types (JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF) and max size (5MB)
POST /api/notifications/merchant/send correctly saves template_type, image_url, cta_text, cta_url, priority
Click tracking creates entries in notification_interactions collection with timestamps
MYU contextual bubbles appear after 3 second timeout when unread notifications exist
NotificationsPage properly displays expandable cards with type badges, reward amounts, and CTA buttons
SendNotificationPage includes all new fields: template selector, image upload zone, CTA inputs, reward slider
seed_data_creation: Test notifications were created during API testing (TEST Promo, TEST Event types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system overhaul fully tested: 1) GET /api/notifications/templates returns 5 template types, 2) POST /api/notifications/upload-image accepts JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF max 5MB, 3) POST /api/notifications/merchant/send accepts template_type/image_url/cta_text/cta_url/priority, 4) GET /api/notifications/me returns notifications with all new fields, 5) PUT /notifications/{id}/click tracks clicks with timestamp and creates interaction record, 6) Frontend NotificationsPage shows expandable cards with type badges (Promo/Menu/Evento), MYU contextual bubble after 3s, MYU FAB button, 7) SendNotificationPage has template selector buttons, image upload dropzone, CTA text/url inputs, interest tags, geo filter, reward slider, 8) MYU chat at /myu still works, 9) Public menu at /menu/{id} still works, 10) Login works without up_points float issues

verified_features.GET /api/notifications/templates: PASS - Returns 5 templates: promo_offer, new_menu, event, welcome, generic
verified_features.POST /api/notifications/upload-image: PASS - Uploads JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF up to 5MB, returns image_url
verified_features.GET /api/notifications/image/{filename}: PASS - Serves uploaded images, 404 for missing
verified_features.POST /api/notifications/merchant/send: PASS - Sends notification with template_type, image_url, cta_text, cta_url, priority
verified_features.GET /api/notifications/me: PASS - Returns user notifications with type, image_url, cta_text, cta_url, merchant_logo, priority
verified_features.PUT /api/notifications/{id}/click: PASS - Tracks click with is_clicked=true and clicked_at timestamp
verified_features.NotificationsPage expandable cards: PASS - 7 notification cards, expand on click showing full message and CTA
verified_features.NotificationsPage MYU empty state: NOT TESTED - User had notifications (would show MYU if empty)
verified_features.NotificationsPage MYU contextual bubble: PASS - Bubble appeared after 3s: 'C'e qualcosa di interessante qui'
verified_features.NotificationsPage MYU FAB: PASS - FAB button visible bottom right
verified_features.SendNotificationPage image upload: PASS - Dropzone with 'Carica immagine promo' text
verified_features.SendNotificationPage CTA fields: PASS - Text and URL inputs present
verified_features.MYU chat page /myu: PASS - Chat history, input, send button all working
verified_features.Public menu page /menu/{id}: PASS - Shows Trattoria da Mario menu with categories and items
verified_features.Login works (up_points bug): PASS - up_points returned as integer, login successful

mocked_apis.note: MYU uses real OpenAI gpt-4.1-nano via Emergent LLM key - responses are non-deterministic
